raw_log_normalization: pulled via `rtk proxy gh run view --job <id> --log` and stripped the leading <job>\t<step>\t prefix per line so timestamps lead each line, matching v1.3 raw.log format.
notes: buildx bake of the integration-tests target failed at build step #72 [nydus 1/2] because the RUN wget step in Dockerfile:336 got HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway from github.com when downloading nydus-static-v2.4.0-linux-amd64.tgz. flaky_or_transient = true (transient github outage; not a real Dockerfile bug). Two notable properties for benchmarking: (1) failure_category is docker_build (fills v1.3 gap, was 0/16); (2) signal_position is middle (~48%) — failure block sits at lines ~1853-1901 of 3979, with ~2000 more lines of post-failure coverage-upload action below it. This stresses tail-200's blind spot. Selected as Batch 1 case 3.
